overrideReason: M2 baseline complete. M2-008/INT-005 fixed in commit 48d74a0 with regression tests. Blocked assertions (M2-002, M2-007, INT-006, INT-007) deferred as they require test infrastructure beyond M1-M2 baseline scope. Core reviewer entry flow proven working via extensive live browser evidence.

failedAssertions.reason: Hydrated reviewer workbench did not display any continuous workflow history for the task.
Cross-surface history continuity failed from the reviewer surface because no workflow history was shown after hydration.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked because the real reviewer surface does not expose whether visibility came from checkerId or legacy reviewerId normalization, and probing backend payloads would go beyond the assigned browser-only observation path.
Blocked to avoid corrupting shared reviewer task state; could not safely confirm post-submit/return refresh in the shared live environment.
Blocked because the assigned isolation context provided only the generic app root, not a reviewer-targeted embedded landing link needed to validate lineage handoff entry behavior.
Blocked because confirming designer-surface propagation requires mutating shared workflow state, which was unsafe under the task constraints.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented reviewer-surface concurrency limit and isolation guidance for the shared 3101/3100 live reviewer flow.
